meta_title: For Students: SaaS starter kit to Solve tutorial hell (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome tutorial hell. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Students: Escape Tutorial Hell with a SaaS Starter Kit
content.seo_description: Break free from tutorial hell. Use this advanced checklist to build a production-grade SaaS starter kit using Antigravity and Claude Code for your portfolio.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop watching and start shipping. By leveraging a modular SaaS starter kit, you gain a production-ready foundation. Use Antigravity to scaffold complex architecture and Claude Code to automate implementation, turning abstract concepts into a tangible, deployable asset that proves your engineering capability to future employers.
content.intro:
You’ve watched a dozen 'build a clone' videos, yet your GitHub remains a graveyard of half-finished repositories. You aren't lacking talent; you are lacking a system. The bridge between a student and a software engineer is the shift from following instructions to architecting systems that solve real-world problems.

Today, we pivot. We are moving beyond the sandbox. By deploying a robust SaaS starter kit, you stop playing with code and start building products. With Antigravity to handle the heavy lifting of boilerplate and Claude Code to accelerate your logic implementation, you will transform from a tutorial consumer into a serious AI builder.

steps.title: Define Core Architecture
steps.description: Establish the foundation by defining your stack. Avoid 'feature creep' by focusing on Auth, Database, and Stripe integration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a robust SaaS starter kit architecture using Next.js 14, Supabase for auth, and Prisma for ORM. Include a modular directory structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize project structure based on the Antigravity schema provided.'

steps.title: Implement Identity Management
steps.description: Secure user access early. Never build auth from scratch; use proven patterns to ensure production-level security.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a secure Supabase authentication middleware and protected route wrapper for Next.js.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Configure auth-middleware.ts and secure all /dashboard routes.'

steps.title: Integrate Payment Infrastructure
steps.description: A SaaS is not a SaaS without billing. Connect Stripe to your user model to handle subscription states.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe webhook handler to sync subscription status with the Supabase user profile.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement stripe-webhook.ts and link it to the user database schema.'

steps.title: Build AI Logic Layer
steps.description: Inject AI capabilities using LLM integrations. Focus on structured output for reliable application responses.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an AI API route using the Vercel AI SDK to stream responses from GPT-4o with tool calling enabled.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement chat-stream API route with tool calling configuration.'

steps.title: Automate Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Remove friction by setting up automated deployments. If it isn't deployed, it doesn't exist.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for automated linting, testing, and deployment to Vercel.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate .github/workflows/deploy.yml for automated CI/CD pipeline.'

pro_tips: Never hardcode environment variables; use a strictly typed config validation layer with Zod.
Treat your SaaS starter kit as a product, not a script—write unit tests for your auth flow immediately.
Use Claude Code to refactor your code into smaller, single-responsibility modules every time you add a new feature.
Prioritize database indexing early to prevent performance bottlenecks as your user base scales.
Document your architectural decisions in a README.md; this is what interviewers actually look for in your repo.
content.next_steps: After completing your MVP, push your code to GitHub, write a technical case study on the challenges you overcame, and deploy the live link to your portfolio.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for permission to be an engineer. Build, ship, and iterate until your project is live and solving real problems. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
